analysis_result: Median progression-free survival (PFS) in the MPNST-G1 methylation group = 0.67 years (95% CI: 0.35 to inf; n=8, 6 recurrence events, 2 censored).
denominator_used: N = 8 samples; all rows in MOESM10 'Fig 1b' sheet with Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G1'.
assumptions_made: Event = Recurrence (1 = recurred, 0 = censored at last follow-up); Time variable = 'Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up' (years) used as PFS duration; standard Kaplan-Meier with no left-truncation/delayed entry; median computed via lifelines KaplanMeierFitter.median_survival_time_; upper CI is infinite because the survival function plateaus at 0.25 above 1 year, so the 0.975 quantile is not reached.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx, sheet 'Fig 1b'
   - Shape: 75 rows x 3 columns
   - Columns: Methylation_Group, Recurrence, 'Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up'
   - Methylation group counts: PremalignantNF_G3=29, Benign_NF-G4=20, Sporadic Spinal NF_G5=10, MPNST_G1=8, MPNST_G2=8

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter: Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G1' -> 8 samples
   - Final analytic cohort: n = 8

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Duration variable: 'Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up' (years, continuous)
   - Event indicator: 'Recurrence' (0 = censored at last follow-up, 1 = recurrence observed)
   - MPNST_G1 events: 6 recurrences, 2 censored
   - MPNST_G1 durations (years): 9.15, 0.42, 0.52, 0.67, 0.39, 0.35, 0.83, 1.24
   - MPNST_G1 Recurrence: 0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 0

D. COMPUTATION
   - Fit lifelines KaplanMeierFitter with durations and event_observed restricted to MPNST_G1.
   - Code:
       kmf = KaplanMeierFitter()
       kmf.fit(durations=mpnst_g1['Time to Recurrence or Last Follow Up'],
               event_observed=mpnst_g1['Recurrence'], label='MPNST_G1')
       kmf.median_survival_time_
   - Median PFS = smallest time t at which S(t) <= 0.5.

E. RESULT
   - Median PFS (MPNST-G1) = 0.67 years
   - 95% CI for median via lifelines.utils.median_survival_times: lower = 0.35 years, upper = inf
   - Survival estimates: S(0.5y)=0.625, S(1y)=0.250, S(2y)=0.250, S(5y)=0.250 (plateau above 1.24y because the last two observations are censored at 1.24y and 9.15y)

F. CAVEATS
   - Very small group (n=8) so the median and its CI are unstable.
   - Upper CI of the median is infinite because the KM curve plateaus at 0.25 and does not drop to 0.025 before the final censoring time, so the 97.5th percentile of the survival distribution is not observed.
   - Analysis is descriptive (no left-truncation or covariates); there is no immortal-time concern for this MOESM10 Fig 1b dataset, which is a cohort-descriptive survival table.
   - No missing values in the three required columns for MPNST_G1 rows.
